items.a: 3kW subsidy પહેલા ₹1.6–2.15 lakh. PM Surya Ghar ₹78,000 subsidy પછી ₹82,000–1.07 lakh. EMI ₹300/month possible. 1kW: ₹30K | 2kW: ₹60K | 3kW+: ₹78K.
pmsuryaghar.gov.in — UGVCL/PGVCL/DGVCL consumer number register. Skylar India free-of-charge full application handle. 30 days bank account subsidy.
Gujarat 300+ sunny days — 3kW avg 12–15 units/day (360–450/month). ₹7–8/unit = ₹2,500–3,500 monthly saving. Annual saving ₹30,000–42,000.
On-grid (subsidy with): 3–5 yr. Off-grid/battery: 5–7 yr. ત્યારબાદ 20+ yr ફ્રી electricity. 25 yr total savings ₹5–10 lakh+.
PM-KUSUM Component-B: Central 30% + State 30% = 60% (3–10HP). Small/Marginal farmers 90% સુધી. Diesel vs Solar ₹50,000–1,00,000+/yr saving.
Panel cleaning: ₹500–1,000/yr. Inverter check: ₹1,000–2,000/yr. Skylar India AMC available. Panels 25 yr 80%+ efficiency maintain.
Cloudy: 10–25% reduced. Gujarat 300+ sunny days — annual excellent. On-grid: grid backup. Hybrid: battery. Net metering rainy season credit.
ના! Waterproof sealants + professional mounts. RCC, Metal, Terracotta — ત્રણ types. 1–3 days install, zero damage guarantee.
